Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Dec-17-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. Hearing On Claim Of Exemption.
The claim of exemption (of Leonard Pailano) is denied. Judgment debtor fails to present evidence that money in the account is traceable as wages. Order signed in open court and mailed to all parties. Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Not reported =(302/CWW)
